summary: Bay Area rent burden data (30%+ of income) by block group with renter building size and income shares.
Bay Area open space areas from CPAD with access type, management agency, site name, and establishment year.
Sensitive communities designation polygons for Bay Area with community names and geographic boundaries.

Bay Area TIP 2023 project point locations with project descriptions, amounts, county indicators, and shape type.
Underutilized parcels in Bay Area with AHSC score, selection flag, environmental data, and APN.
Bay Area transit model network links with mode name, mode code, A/B station nodes, and sequence data.
